requirement_topic.en: JSMO Standards Screening and IEC 62109 Safety Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: JSMO 标准筛查与 IEC 62109 安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: JSMO 標準篩查與 IEC 62109 安全證據

summary.en: Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization standards should be screened for the exact PV inverter model and import or project route. IEC 62109-1:2010 covers general safety requirements for photovoltaic power-conversion equipment, and IEC 62109-2:2011 covers particular safety requirements for PV inverters used with Part 1. Where JSMO has adopted, referenced, or requested equivalent IEC evidence, the test file should match the Jordan route and model scope.
summary.zh: 应按准确光伏逆变器型号以及进口或项目路径筛查约旦标准与计量组织标准。IEC 62109-1:2010 规定光伏功率变换设备的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2:2011 规定与第 1 部分配合使用的光伏逆变器特殊安全要求。如 JSMO 已采纳、引用或要求等效 IEC 证据，测试文件应匹配约旦路径和型号范围。
summary.zht: 應按準確光伏逆變器型號以及進口或項目路徑篩查約旦標準與計量組織標準。IEC 62109-1:2010 規定光伏功率變換設備的一般安全要求，IEC 62109-2:2011 規定與第 1 部分配合使用的光伏逆變器特殊安全要求。如 JSMO 已採納、引用或要求等效 IEC 證據，測試文件應匹配約旦路徑和型號範圍。

standards_or_laws: JSMO standards search and adopted Jordanian standards

summary.en: Chinese suppliers may have IEC 62109 CB reports, GB/T 37408 inverter performance reports, or customer safety files. These can support Jordan review only if the model, firmware, topology, isolation, component list, environmental rating, and report editions align with the Jordan requirement.
summary.zh: 中国供应商可能持有 IEC 62109 CB 报告、GB/T 37408 逆变器性能报告或客户安全文件。只有在型号、固件、拓扑、隔离方式、零部件清单、环境等级和报告版本与约旦要求一致时，这些文件才可支持约旦审查。
summary.zht: 中國供應商可能持有 IEC 62109 CB 報告、GB/T 37408 逆變器性能報告或客戶安全文件。只有在型號、韌體、拓撲、隔離方式、零部件清單、環境等級和報告版本與約旦要求一致時，這些文件才可支持約旦審查。

gap.en: Prepare a JSMO standards-applicability note, CB certificate and test reports, model-variant table, critical-component list, nameplate and manual samples, and clause crosswalk showing how Chinese files satisfy the Jordan or IEC safety route.
gap.zh: 应准备 JSMO 标准适用性说明、CB 证书和测试报告、型号变体表、关键零部件清单、铭牌和说明书样件，以及说明中国文件如何满足约旦或 IEC 安全路径的条款对照表。
gap.zht: 應準備 JSMO 標準適用性說明、CB 證書和測試報告、型號變體表、關鍵零部件清單、銘牌和說明書樣件，以及說明中國文件如何滿足約旦或 IEC 安全路徑的條款對照表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated by Jordanian standards, customs conformity route, project specification, buyer contract, or financing requirement; otherwise used as recognized safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Usually voluntary or customer/project driven unless required by a specific China certification, procurement, or grid-connection route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109 evidence is useful for Jordan only after JSMO or project applicability is confirmed for the exact inverter model and edition.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109 证据只有在确认准确逆变器型号和版本适用 JSMO 或项目要求后，才可用于支持约旦合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109 證據只有在確認準確逆變器型號和版本適用 JSMO 或項目要求後，才可用於支持約旦合規。
